'''Majoor''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of a [[Unidentified Majoor species|native sentient species]]. It was located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 3|''Droids'' (1986) 3]] {{1st}}
